Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Class ScanConfig.Builder

  • Method Details

    • threadCount

      public ScanConfig.Builder threadCount(int n)
      Set the number of concurrent virtual threads. Must be ≥ 1.

    • sectionDelayMs

      public ScanConfig.Builder sectionDelayMs(long ms)
      Set the per-host section delay in milliseconds. Must be ≥ 0.

    • perHostTimeoutMs

      public ScanConfig.Builder perHostTimeoutMs(long ms)
      Set the per-host timeout in milliseconds. Must be ≥ 1000.

    • cipherNameConvention

      public ScanConfig.Builder cipherNameConvention(ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION c)
      Set the cipher name convention.

    • enabledProtocols

      public ScanConfig.Builder enabledProtocols(Set<Integer> protocols)
      Set which TLS protocol versions to probe, or null for all.

    • enabledSections

      public ScanConfig.Builder enabledSections(Set<ScanSection> sections)
      Set which scan sections to execute.

    • build

      public ScanConfig build()
      Build the configuration.
